stream_samples.text: duolingo speech recognition keeps rejecting my perfectly pronounced spanish. v3 is way worse than v2 was
Lost a 412-day streak because the app rolled the day over at 11pm local instead of midnight. Travelled across one timezone. Streak repair won't accept it.
App crashes mid-lesson on Pixel 8, Android 14, every time I hit the listening exercise. Lost XP twice today.
[#19887 P1] Family plan invite link returns "plan full" for slot 2 of 6, billing confirms only owner is active
@duolingo your speech rec keeps marking my Japanese pitch accent wrong on perfectly correct words. JP teacher confirmed
Diamond league tier reset me to Bronze on Sunday for no reason. I finished top-10 last week. Support said "known issue".
Lily's hint quality has nosedived since the model swap. Asked her why "haben" not "hat" and she explained French grammar.
Speech recog v3 false-reject rate is 14.8% on Spanish (was 6.1% on v2). Acoustic model regressed on /r/ trills and aspirated stops.
Android NDK crash in audio.rec.Capture.onBufferReady, 38k events/24h, all on Android 14 Pixel + Samsung One UI 6.1
Streak loss complaints up 2.6x WoW after the daylight-saving transition — appears to be a UTC offset bug at the day boundary
duo's new music course is shockingly good for a free app. my 8yo is hooked
is there a way to set duolingo to use 24h time for the streak rollover? mine ticks at weird hours when I travel
[speech-rec-v3] Spanish acoustic model trained on en-US biased corpus, /r/ FRR is 2.4x v2 baseline, escalated to ML team
After the 7.42 update my streak shows 0 even though I did a lesson. Refresh doesn't fix it. Lost 184 days.
Family plan: invite link generates with stale JWT, accepting member sees "plan full" until owner re-shares from settings

top_epic.title: Roll back Speech Rec v3 false-reject regression on Spanish acoustic model
top_epic.rationale: 2,920 signals concentrated in Spanish learners — backed by a measured 14.8% false-reject rate on v3 vs. 6.1% on v2. Bisect points to a v3 acoustic model trained on an en-US-biased corpus that regresses on /r/ trills and aspirated stops. Streak risk and lesson-completion drop are downstream of every false reject.
top_epic.verdict: Ship-critical — speech-rec is the core practice loop and the v3 regression directly drives streak loss.
top_epic.recommendation: Pin Spanish learners to v2 acoustic model behind a feature flag, retrain v3 with a balanced ES-LATAM/ES-ES corpus, gate v3 rollout on FRR parity.
acceptance_criteria: Spanish acoustic FRR <=6.5% on the held-out evaluation set before re-rollout
Per-locale model pinning lets us hold v2 while v3 is repaired
Speech-rec false-reject events emit phoneme + locale tags for monitoring
Streak shielding triggers automatically when FRR exceeds rollback threshold
